name: heroku-duckdb-extract
description: Use when the user wants to extract data from a Heroku Postgres database into a local DuckDB file with anonymization. Triggers: "pull production data into DuckDB", "snapshot Heroku to DuckDB", "anonymize Heroku data for local analysis", "set up local analytics DB from Heroku". Do not use for: schema review without extraction, Heroku Postgres connection troubleshooting, or running migrations.
